purpose: Prove IAMScope emits scenario-edge-level S3 resource-policy Allow evidence without requiring a finding-level claim.
claim_surface: IAMScope can collect the Env24 S3 bucket policy.
IAMScope can parse the exact unconditioned Allow from env24-reader to the Env24 bucket.
IAMScope can emit a s3:GetObject_resource_policy edge with resource-policy provenance.
IAMScope does not need or claim generic resource-policy Deny support for this Allow evidence.
benchmark_proves: The Env24 IAM user node exists in scenario.json.
The Env24 S3 bucket node exists in scenario.json.
The exact Env24 reader->bucket s3:GetObject_resource_policy edge exists in scenario.json.
The edge carries resource-policy provenance and has no conditions.
No matching identity-policy s3:GetObject_permission edge exists for the same source and target.
No generic RESOURCE_POLICY_DENY constraint is emitted.
benchmark_does_not_prove: It does not prove a finding-level resource-policy Allow reasoner.
It does not prove runtime S3 object readability.
It does not prove S3 PutBucketPolicy takeover through resource-policy Allow.
It does not prove Secrets Manager, KMS, or Lambda resource-policy Allow behavior.
It does not prove generic resource-policy Deny support.
It does not prove production readiness.
unknowns_remaining: Env25 scoped-away mutation remains future work.
Finding-level resource-policy Allow semantics remain outside this case.
Conditioned resource-policy Allow statements remain outside this case.
Generic resource-policy Deny remains explicitly de-scoped.

environment.notes: Single-account IAM/S3 resource-policy Allow scenario-edge benchmark. No S3 objects are required.

ground_truth.reason: The bucket policy allows exact env24-reader to perform s3:GetObject on the benchmark bucket objects, and current IAMScope support exports that as a resource-policy scenario edge rather than a finding.

directly_proven_if_pass: The exact Env24 resource-policy Allow edge exists structurally.
The exact Env24 edge is unconditioned and has resource-policy provenance.
The Env24 target path is not accidentally witnessed by an identity-policy s3:GetObject edge.
No generic RESOURCE_POLICY_DENY constraint is emitted.
strongly_supported_if_pass: IAMScope's S3 resource-policy Allow parser/binder/export path behaves coherently on one controlled live AWS fixture.
only_implied_even_if_pass: Broader resource-policy Allow correctness remains only implied.
